candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row is explicitly SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it should not be added to the selected COGS bucket 'Direct costs'.

This appears as a blank/header-like row with no visible values and no indication that it is a separate operating COGS D&A line. There is no explicit depreciation/amortisation row tied to 'Direct costs'.

variables.notes: No explicit operating D&A row attributable to COGS / Direct costs is visible before the financial section. To avoid double counting, do not add any separate COGS D&A row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit SG&A depreciation line shown separately from the selected XSGA bucket 'Central administration'. Because it sits alongside the selected SG&A component rather than clearly beneath it, it should be added separately later to capture SG&A D&A.
This row has no visible values and looks like a blank/header-like line. Since a more specific SG&A depreciation row exists, this should not be selected.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A depreciation line because it is separately presented in the operating section and is not clearly embedded within the chosen XSGA_COMPONENTS row 'Central administration'. The generic 'Depreciation & Amortization' row is not selected because it has no visible values and would risk ambiguity/double counting.
